input_text: Sara, the sister of Mike, left. Jessica is a mouse. The bike is small. The man carrying a bag waved. The toy of the child was broken. Young elephants are not big. The length of Nile is 80 kilometers. The cat sat on the mat and purred. Catholics can not disappear. Sue is a true patriot. The room was cleaned. The roof of John's house is green. The city was destroyed. A village road was narrow. Sadly, Mary lost the letter. Sandra travelled to the office. The guide offered the tourists tea. John has a house?
